title: rubus × pseudofoliosus
intro: Rubus × pseudofoliosus, a hybrid of the raspberry plant, is a rare and lesser-known species of bramble native to Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high levels of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudofoliosus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus × pseudofoliosus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
